content.text: I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Lines 26, 186): The `RowProps` type from `@openshift-console/dynamic-plugin-sdk` has changed — it now includes `index: number` and `onSelect?: OnSelect` in its type. The component `RuleRow` at line 186 uses `RowProps<CORSRule, CustomData>` and destructures from it. Since the new properties (`index` and `onSelect`) are being passed by the `VirtualizedTable` to the row component, the `RuleRow` component just needs to accept them. The component currently destructures `obj`, `activeColumnIDs`, and `rowData` — the new `index` and `onSelect` props are optional/unused, so no functional changes are needed. The type import itself doesn't need to change since it's the upstream type that changed. This fix is informational — no code changes are required in this file since the component simply doesn't use the new properties and they're handled by the spread.

**Fix 2 & 3** (Line 259): Both fixes target the same thing — the CSS class `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` was removed. I need to replace it with an inline style or appropriate alternative. The PatternFly v6 equivalent would be to use an inline style `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` since the utility class was removed.

Let me apply the changes:
Now let me verify the final file looks correct:
The edit looks correct. Let me also verify the file is still syntactically sound by checking the full relevant sections:
Good. The file is in good shape. Let me verify the complete file one more time to make sure everything is consistent:
The file is complete and correct. Let me do a final sanity check on the full file:

Good — same line count (364 lines), confirming only the in-place edit was made. The file is complete.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `RowProps` type changed (added `index: number` and `onSelect?: OnSelect`)
**No change needed.** The `RowProps` type is imported from `@openshift-console/dynamic-plugin-sdk` (line 26) and used at line 186 in the `RuleRow` component. The upstream type definition added two new properties (`index: number` and `onSelect?: OnSelect`), but this is a **non-breaking additive change** for this file:
- The `RuleRow` component destructures only `obj`, `activeColumnIDs`, and `rowData` — it does not need `index` or `onSelect`.
- The new properties are passed automatically by `VirtualizedTable` to the `Row` component; unused props are harmlessly ignored via the rest of the destructuring.
- No code change is required in the consuming file. The type change is in the upstream SDK's `.d.ts` and will take effect when the dependency is updated.

### Fix 2 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` removed (sd-css-dead-class rule)
**Applied.** Replaced `className="pf-v5-u-text-align-right"` with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` on line 259. The CSS utility class was removed in the new version with no `pf-v6` equivalent, so an inline style achieves the same right-alignment effect.

### Fix 3 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` removed (semver-css-class-removed rule)
**Already applied by Fix 2.** Fix 2 and Fix 3 target the identical line (259) and the identical CSS class (`pf-v5-u-text-align-right`). The replacement with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` satisfies both rules.
